title: Putin, Xi meeting in Uzbekistan as Ukraine war overshadows security summit - National
description: Chinese President Xi Jinping, Russia's Vladimir Putin and leaders from India and Central Asia gathered Thursday in Uzbekistan for a summit of a security group.
keywords: Ukraine, China, Russia, russia china, Russia Ukraine, Shanghai Cooperation Organization, Ukraine Russia, Ukraine war, Uzbekistan summit, Vladimir Putin, Xi Jinping, xi putin meeting, Xi Putin summit, Politics, World
